element_introduction_order.mastery_context: players learn that age affects starting skills and physical prowess; occupation specialization determines class-like roles
open-world navigation across real Holy Roman Empire locations; reputation system learned through travel and quest choices
players discover weapon vs armor effectiveness (hammers better than swords against plate armor); skill-based system rewards preparation
players learn reputation is region-specific; same party can be hated in one city and exalted in another
hunting witches and heretics; discovering fortress locations for final Baphomet confrontation

element_introduction_order.element: Demon lord Baphomet and final fortress
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: located in obscure castle; requires defeating evil occupants of multiple fortresses; final apocalypse prevention battle
historical fantasy setting where monsters and magic exist alongside real 15th century geography
visual/atmospheric variation during party movement between cities

typical_tension_triggers: discovering fortress locations tied to Baphomet quest
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: open-ended exploration with nonlinear quest progression; tension builds through quest chain discoveries leading to final confrontation; players control pacing by choosing between evil deeds (negative reputation) and positive quests (reputation gain)

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: geographic distribution of fortresses containing evil occupants; obscure castle location for Baphomet requires discovery through quest progression
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: final boss location randomized per playthrough and only discoverable after defeating fortress occupants; Baphomet castle intentionally obscure

difficulty_curve.early_game: character creation and initial travel exploration; light combat encounters; introduction to reputation mechanics and city navigation across historical Holy Roman Empire
difficulty_curve.mid_game: quest chains involving witch hunting and heretic elimination; discovering fortress locations; moderate combat encounters with tactical weapon-armor interactions
difficulty_curve.late_game: fortress assaults against evil occupants; final journey to obscure Baphomet castle; climactic real-time combat against demon lord for apocalypse prevention
notable_spikes: first major combat encounter (introduces real-time tactical system)

notable_level_patterns.description: Real historical cities serve as safe zones and quest hubs; geographically accurate Holy Roman Empire locations (Germany, Netherlands, Denmark, France, Switzerland, Austria, Czech Republic, Poland) with period names; reputation varies per region
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any city (historically accurate medieval European settlement)

notable_level_patterns.description: Evil-occupied fortresses scattered across map; must be discovered and defeated progressively to ultimately locate Baphomet's obscure castle; locations partially randomized per playthrough
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Fortress containing witch or heretic; Baphomet's final castle

notable_level_patterns.description: Movement between cities uses graphical interface; real-time combat encounters occur during travel; seasonal visual variation; nonlinear routing choices
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Journey between any two cities with potential combat encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Nonlinear main quest involving hunting witches and heretics; multiple optional quests available simultaneously; choices affect regional reputation; all paths eventually lead to final Baphomet confrontation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any quest-bearing city or fortress location
